prompt:
Undertake a comprehensive analysis and construct a robust predictive model using the "Housing Prices" dataset from Kaggle to forecast residential property values.

1. Data Import and Cleaning: Input: housing_prices.csv -> Output: cleaned_data.csv
2. Predictive Model Development: Input: cleaned_data.csv -> Output: predicted_prices.csv (predicted vs actual values)
3. Model Evaluation: Output: model_evaluation_metrics.csv (MAE, RMSE)
4. Data Visualization: Output: visualizations.png (scatter plots, histograms, box plots)
5. Comprehensive Report: Output: housing_prices_analysis_report.pdf (data cleaning, modeling, evaluation, insights, all visualizations)
expected: 1. Data cleaning: Data Cleaning Completeness — cleaned_data.csv. 2. Predictive modeling: MAE — predicted_prices.csv + model_evaluation_metrics.csv. 3. Visualization: Visualization Completeness — visualizations.png. 4. Report: Report Completeness — housing_prices_analysis_report.pdf.
